basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) Project Staff Nurse II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website bfuhs.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Staff Nurse II is 30 years. Age relaxation will be given to SC/OBC category as per the Punjab Govt. Rules.

qualification.details: Project Staff Nurse II: Candidates must possess GNM (General Nursing Midwifery) from a recognized institution.

salary_details.details: Project Staff Nurse II: Rs. 22000 per month (Including HRA)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Overview
BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BFUHS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Staff Nurse II: Candidates must possess GNM (General Nursing Midwifery) from a recognized institution.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit for Project Staff Nurse II is 30 years. Age relaxation will be given to SC/OBC category as per the Punjab Govt. Rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Staff Nurse II: Rs. 22000 per month (Including HRA)

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS). BFUHS is a prominent health university located in Faridkot, Punjab, dedicated to medical education and research.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment drive is Project Staff Nurse II. This position is crucial for various health projects undertaken by the university, contributing to public health initiatives.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff Nurse II?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Staff Nurse II post. Candidates should note the limited number of positions and prepare thoroughly for the selection process.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for BFUHS Project Staff Nurse II recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Interested candidates need to download the application form, fill it out, and send it to the specified address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to submit the application for Project Staff Nurse II?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Project Staff Nurse II post is 13 July 2026. Applicants are advised to send their forms well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for Project Staff Nurse II?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for Project Staff Nurse II must possess a GNM (General Nursing Midwifery) qualification from a recognized institution. This ensures candidates have the necessary medical knowledge and skills.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for Project Staff Nurse II post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Staff Nurse II post is 30 years. Age relaxation for SC/OBC categories will be applicable as per the Punjab Government Rules, providing opportunities for a wider range of candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for Project Staff Nurse II?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Project Staff Nurse II position is Rs. 22000 per month, which includes HRA. This competitive salary package is designed to attract skilled nursing professionals to the university's projects.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1770 for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 885 for SC/ST candidates. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for Project Staff Nurse II?
faq.answer: The selection process for Project Staff Nurse II includes a Written Test, Document Verification, and an Interview. Candidates must perform well in all stages to be considered for the final selection.
